title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in US-Israel strike on Minab school
fullText: NewsFeedThousands gathered in Minab, Iran, for the mass funeral of 165 schoolgirls and staff killed in what Tehran says was a US-Israeli strike on a primary school. Washington denies targeting a school. The UN and rights officials call for an independent investigation into the attack.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Thousands gathered in Minab, Iran, for a mass funeral of 165 schoolgirls and staff killed in a US-Israeli airstrike.
